main.description: Operator-only node status, including peer topology, local DID document, envelope current pointer health, and envelope manifest cleanup counters/tombstones for stale/orphan manifest deletion observability.

operator_did.description: Operator DID required to access this status endpoint.

did_document.description: Local DID document advertised by this node.

peer_count.description: Number of peers currently in the local neighborhood table.

peers.description: Hex-encoded peer node ids currently visible to this node.

envelope_manifest_cleanup.description: Best-effort cleanup counters and tombstone samples for stale or orphan envelope manifest deletion.

successes.description: Cleanup attempts that deleted a manifest block.

failures.description: Cleanup attempts that did not delete a manifest block.

tombstone_count.description: Number of retained cleanup tombstone records.

valid_tombstone_count.description: Number of retained cleanup tombstone records matching the current schema.

malformed_tombstone_count.description: Number of retained tombstone records that could not be decoded as JSON or do not match the current schema.

omitted_tombstone_count.description: Number of valid tombstones omitted from recent_tombstones because only the latest recent_tombstone_limit records are returned inline.

recent_tombstone_limit.description: Maximum number of valid tombstones returned inline in recent_tombstones.

recent_tombstones.description: Recent cleanup tombstone records in descending cleanup_attempt order.

deleted.description: Whether the manifest block was deleted.

cleanup_attempt.description: Monotonic cleanup attempt number assigned when the tombstone was recorded.

recorded_at_unix_ms.description: Unix epoch millisecond timestamp assigned when the tombstone was recorded.

envelope_current_pointers.description: Health counters for ciphertext CID to current manifest CID pointers. Counts only metadata needed to diagnose broken pointers; plaintext and wrapped DEKs are never returned.

total_count.description: Number of retained current pointer records.

readable_count.description: Current pointer records whose ciphertext CID key, manifest CID value, and manifest body are readable.

unreadable_manifest_count.description: Current pointer records with a valid manifest CID value whose manifest body is missing or unreadable.

malformed_ct_cid_count.description: Current pointer records whose ciphertext CID key is malformed.

malformed_manifest_cid_count.description: Current pointer records whose manifest CID value is not valid UTF-8 or not a valid CID.
